policies.code_of_conduct: Adopted the Trader's Sustainability Code (Cargill-aligned). Workers are local; recruitment is direct from neighboring communities. Living-wage benchmark met for all permanent staff; seasonal workers receive overtime per Paraguayan labor code.
policies.anti_bribery: Anti-bribery policy in place; not ISO 37001 certified. Training delivered annually to managers.
policies.whistleblower: Hotline operated by the Paraguay Chamber of Agriculture (industry channel, not fully independent).
policies.human_rights: ILO C29/87/98/100/105/111/138/182 adopted in written policy.
policies.environment: ISO 14001 in progress (target Q3 2026). Some land was cleared in 2020 prior to current management — clearing has stopped since 2022.
policies.climate_transition: No SBTi target. Cattle herd emissions estimated but not third-party verified.
policies.deforestation_due_diligence: EUDR-ready: plot-level geolocation available for 78% of soy area; 22% (legacy plots) lack pre-2020 records. Cattle traceability covers only the last fattening farm, not the calf source.

self_assessment_answers.age_verification_policy: ID check on hire; minimum age 18; sample audit annually by Chamber
self_assessment_answers.wage_data_by_role: Permanent: PYG 3.2M/month (vs Anker benchmark PYG 2.8M, 14% above). Seasonal: minimum-wage compliant.
self_assessment_answers.deforestation_legacy: Plots cleared 2020 are within the 2020 EUDR cut-off; 22% of soy area cannot demonstrate pre-2020 origin
self_assessment_answers.biodiversity: Site within 12km of Defensores del Chaco National Park; mitigation measures: riparian buffers, wildlife corridors

sample_transcripts_redacted: [REDACTED:PERSON] reported overtime pay calculation dispute. Resolved: HR recalculated and paid arrears.
[REDACTED:PERSON] reported dust exposure during harvest. Resolved: PPE distributed; medical check offered.

findings.description: Heat-stress protocol incomplete for outdoor crew.
Riparian buffer on plot 14 below 30m minimum; reforestation underway.

ghg_inventory.boundary: operational control; cattle herd emissions self-estimated
